'''âg-l-r-z''' ('''kagalrezoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:escallop|escallop]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-l-r-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:escallop|escallop]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âg-l-r-z
|-
! Lemma
| kagalrezoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigalrezoko|thigalrezoko]] || [[word:jigalrezoko|jigalrezoko]] || [[word:shigalrezoko|shigalrezoko]] || [[word:kigalrezoko|kigalrezoko]]
|-

|-
